description: Enable Units of Measure and configure two new units, 'Case of 6' and 'Case of 12', within the 'Unit' category. Update the draft Purchase Order for 'Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits' so that Hendrick's Gin has a quantity of 3 'Case of 6' and Woodford Reserve has a quantity of 5 'Case of 12'. Complete the procurement process by confirming the order and validating the incoming receipt to ensure inventory reflects the converted bottle counts.

natural_language.prompt: Enable Units of Measure in Inventory Settings. Create two new UoMs ('Case of 6' and 'Case of 12') under the 'Unit' category. Locate the existing draft Request for Quotation (Purchase Order) for 'Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits' and update its lines: change Hendrick's Gin to use a quantity of 3 with the 'Case of 6' UoM, and change Woodford Reserve to use a quantity of 5 with the 'Case of 12' UoM. Finally, confirm the Purchase Order and validate the incoming receipt so the inventory correctly reflects the converted individual bottle counts.
